sys_properties.name: u_escalation.sla_warn_minutes
sys_properties.description: Minutes remaining on SLA before a P2 incident triggers a warning escalation

sys_properties.name: u_escalation.auto_promote_p1
sys_properties.description: When true, incidents that breach SLA are automatically promoted to P1

sys_properties.name: u_escalation.audit_enabled
sys_properties.description: Enable writing escalation events to u_incident_escalation_audit table
